title: release/22.x: [SimplifyCFG] Fix null pointer dereference in foldCondBranchOnValueKnownInPredecessorImpl (#178835)
author: llvmbot

tests.test_body:
declare void @foo()

declare void @bar()

define void @cleanuppad() personality ptr null {
entry:
  invoke void @foo()
          to label %bb1 unwind label %cleanup

cleanup:                                          ; preds = %bb1, %entry
  %c = phi i1 [ true, %entry ], [ false, %bb1 ]
  %cp = cleanuppad within none []
  br i1 %c, label %cleanup_2, label %cpret

bb1:                                              ; preds = %entry
  invoke void @bar()
          to label %exit unwind label %cleanup

exit:                                             ; preds = %bb1
  ret void

cpret:                                            ; preds = %cleanup_2, %cleanup
  cleanupret from %cp unwind to caller

cleanup_2:                                        ; preds = %cleanup
  store i1 false, ptr null, align 1
  br label %cpret
}
